<h1>Source code for epub2text.formatters</h1><div class="highlight"><pre>
<span></span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Text formatting utilities for different output styles.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

<span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">re</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">phrasplit</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">split_clauses</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">split_paragraphs</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">split_sentences</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">phrasplit</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">split_long_lines</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">_phrasplit_split_long_lines</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="collapse_paragraph">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#epub2text.formatters.collapse_paragraph">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">collapse_paragraph</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">paragraph</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    Collapse a paragraph to a single line.</span>

<span class="sd">    Replaces internal newlines with spaces.</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        paragraph: Single paragraph text</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        Paragraph as single line</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="c1"># Replace newlines with spaces, collapse multiple spaces</span>
    <span class="n">result</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;\s*\n\s*&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot; &quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">paragraph</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">result</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;  +&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot; &quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">result</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">result</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="format_paragraphs">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#epub2text.formatters.format_paragraphs">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">format_paragraphs</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">separator</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;  &quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">one_line_per_paragraph</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    Format text with paragraph separators.</span>

<span class="sd">    This function works without phrasplit.</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        text: Input text with paragraph breaks (double newlines)</span>
<span class="sd">        separator: String to prepend to new paragraphs (default: &quot;  &quot; two spaces)</span>
<span class="sd">        one_line_per_paragraph: If True, collapse each paragraph to single line</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        Formatted text with separator at start of each new paragraph.</span>
<span class="sd">        Chapter titles (lines preceded by 4+ newlines) are preserved.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">paragraphs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_paragraphs</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">paragraphs</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">result_parts</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">i</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">para</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">paragraphs</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">one_line_per_paragraph</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">para</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">collapse_paragraph</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># First paragraph: no separator</span>
            <span class="n">result_parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="c1"># Subsequent paragraphs: add separator at start</span>
            <span class="c1"># Don&#39;t add separator to chapter titles (they are standalone)</span>
            <span class="c1"># Chapter titles are identified by checking if they&#39;re very short</span>
            <span class="c1"># and don&#39;t end with sentence-ending punctuation</span>
            <span class="n">is_likely_chapter_title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="mi">100</span>
                <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">para</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rstrip</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">endswith</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="s2">&quot;.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;!&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;?&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;&quot;&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&#39;&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
                <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">para</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">separator</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">is_likely_chapter_title</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="c1"># Add separator to each line of the paragraph</span>
                <span class="n">lines</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">para</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">separator</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span>
                <span class="n">para</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">result_parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">result_parts</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="format_sentences">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#epub2text.formatters.format_sentences">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">format_sentences</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">separator</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;  &quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    Format text with one sentence per line.</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        text: Input text with paragraph breaks</span>
<span class="sd">        separator: String to prepend at paragraph boundaries (default: &quot;  &quot;)</span>
<span class="sd">        language_model: spaCy language model to use</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        Text with one sentence per line, separator at paragraph boundaries.</span>
<span class="sd">        Chapter titles are preserved.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">paragraphs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_paragraphs</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">paragraphs</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">result_lines</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">i</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">para</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">paragraphs</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="c1"># Check if this is likely a chapter title</span>
        <span class="c1"># (short, no sentence-ending punctuation)</span>
        <span class="n">is_likely_chapter_title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="mi">100</span>
            <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">para</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rstrip</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">endswith</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="s2">&quot;.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;!&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;?&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;&quot;&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&#39;&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
            <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">para</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">is_likely_chapter_title</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">result_lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="c1"># Process paragraph into sentences using phrasplit</span>
        <span class="n">sentences</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_sentences</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="c1"># Add separator to first sentence if not first paragraph</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">j</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sent</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sentences</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">j</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">separator</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">result_lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">separator</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">result_lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sent</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">result_lines</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="format_clauses">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#epub2text.formatters.format_clauses">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">format_clauses</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">separator</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;  &quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    Format text with one clause per line (split at commas).</span>

<span class="sd">    Uses spaCy for sentence detection, then splits each sentence at commas.</span>
<span class="sd">    The comma stays at the end of each clause, creating natural pause points</span>
<span class="sd">    for text-to-speech processing.</span>

<span class="sd">    Requires phrasplit to be installed.</span>

<span class="sd">    :param text: Input text with paragraph breaks.</span>
<span class="sd">    :param separator: String to prepend at paragraph boundaries. Default is two spaces.</span>
<span class="sd">    :param language_model: spaCy language model to use.</span>
<span class="sd">    :returns: Text with one clause per line, separator at paragraph boundaries.</span>
<span class="sd">        Chapter titles are preserved.</span>

<span class="sd">    Example::</span>

<span class="sd">        Input: &quot;I do like coffee, and I like wine.&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">        Output:</span>
<span class="sd">            &quot;I do like coffee,</span>
<span class="sd">            and I like wine.&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">paragraphs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_paragraphs</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">paragraphs</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">result_lines</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">i</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">para</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">paragraphs</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="c1"># Check if this is likely a chapter title</span>
        <span class="n">is_likely_chapter_title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="mi">100</span>
            <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">para</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rstrip</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">endswith</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="s2">&quot;.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;!&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;?&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;&quot;&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&#39;&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
            <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">para</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">is_likely_chapter_title</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">result_lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="c1"># Process paragraph into clauses using phrasplit</span>
        <span class="n">clauses</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_clauses</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">para</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">clauses</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="c1"># Add separator to first clause if not first paragraph</span>
        <span class="n">is_first_clause_in_para</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">clause</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">clauses</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">is_first_clause_in_para</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">separator</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">result_lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">separator</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">clause</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">result_lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">clause</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">is_first_clause_in_para</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">result_lines</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="split_long_lines">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#epub2text.formatters.split_long_lines">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">split_long_lines</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">max_length</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">separator</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;  &quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">language_model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en_core_web_sm&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
<span class="sd">    Split lines exceeding max_length at clause/sentence boundaries.</span>

<span class="sd">    Strategy:</span>
<span class="sd">    1. First try to split at sentence boundaries</span>
<span class="sd">    2. If still too long, split at clause boundaries (commas, semicolons, etc.)</span>
<span class="sd">    3. If still too long, split at word boundaries</span>

<span class="sd">    Args:</span>
<span class="sd">        text: Input text (may already be formatted)</span>
<span class="sd">        max_length: Maximum line length in characters</span>
<span class="sd">        separator: Paragraph separator (preserved)</span>
<span class="sd">        language_model: spaCy language model to use</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns:</span>
<span class="sd">        Text with long lines split. Chapter titles are preserved.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">lines</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">result_lines</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">line</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="c1"># Preserve chapter titles (short lines without typical sentence endings)</span>
        <span class="n">is_likely_chapter_title</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">line</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="mi">100</span>
            <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">line</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">line</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">endswith</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="s2">&quot;.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;!&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;?&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">&#39;&quot;&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&#39;&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">is_likely_chapter_title</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">result_lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">line</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="c1"># Check if line is within limit</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">line</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="n">max_length</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">result_lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">line</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>

        <span class="c1"># Determine if line starts with separator</span>
        <span class="n">has_separator</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">line</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">startswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">separator</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">separator</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
        <span class="n">content</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">line</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">separator</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">:]</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">has_separator</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="n">line</span>

        <span class="c1"># Split the long line using phrasplit (avoid calling ourselves)</span>
        <span class="n">split_lines_list</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_phrasplit_split_long_lines</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">content</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">max_length</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language_model</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="c1"># Defensive: if upstream ever returns a string, normalize to list</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">split_lines_list</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">split_lines_list</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">split_lines_list</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="c1"># Add separator to first line if original had it</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">k</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">split_line</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">split_lines_list</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">k</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">has_separator</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">result_lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">separator</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">split_line</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">result_lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">split_line</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">result_lines</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<span class="n">__all__</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;collapse_paragraph&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;format_paragraphs&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;format_sentences&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;format_clauses&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;split_long_lines&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;split_paragraphs&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">]</span>
</pre></div>
